Vecova

Vecova is a Canadian charity providing inclusive housing, wellness, mental health, and employment services to empower people with disabilities.

Vecova

CAREERS
CAREERS

Are you ready to embark on a rewarding journey where you can make a meaningful impact every day? At Vecova, we’re more than just an organization—we’re a team dedicated to creating inclusive communities where everyone belongs and thrives. Explore our career and volunteer opportunities and discover how you can be a part of something truly special.

Make the Most Out of Life

We ask our employees to give us their best and we’re committed to doing the same. It’s why we offer comprehensive benefits designed to empower you and your family to live life well.

Purpose-Driven Work

Join a team that is passionate about making a difference in the lives of individuals with disabilities. At Vecova, our work is guided by a deep sense of purpose and commitment to empowering others to live their best lives.

Inclusive Culture
